subject: PRODUCTION ISSUE: Payment gateway down — urgent action required

messages.body: Hey everyone, the payment gateway started throwing 503 errors about 20 minutes ago. We're seeing a spike in failed transactions — roughly 40% of attempts are failing. I've rolled back the last deploy but it didn't help. Need someone from product to make a call: do we switch to the fallback provider or wait for the fix? This is blocking revenue.

Looking at the logs now. It's not the deploy — it's an upstream timeout from Stripe's side. Our requests are timing out after 5s instead of the usual 300ms. I can increase the timeout threshold as a temp workaround but that'll degrade UX. Full fix might take 2-3 hours.

Getting flooded with customer tickets. At least 50+ complaints in the last 15 minutes. People are unable to checkout — some are getting charged but no confirmation. Can we at least put up a banner or disable checkout temporarily?

subject: Q3 Performance Feedback — need your input by Friday

messages.body: Hi Diksha, hope you're doing well. As part of our mid-year review cycle, I'm collecting feedback for your Q3 performance assessment. Could you share your thoughts on: 1) Key wins this quarter 2) Areas where you'd like more support 3) Goals for Q4? Please keep it to a paragraph or two. Deadline is EOD Friday. Happy to chat if you want to discuss in person instead.

Hi team, here are the notes from today's standup:

What's done:
- Analytics dashboard v2 — backend APIs complete (Vikram)
- Payment flow redesign mockups ready for review (Ananya)
- User onboarding email sequence drafted (Diksha)

What's in progress:
- Kubernetes migration — 70% done (Sneha)
- Load testing for peak traffic (Ravi)

Blockers:
- None currently

No major decisions needed. Keep up the good work!

Hi Diksha, quick reminder — the Acme Analytics contract expires on July 15. Their account manager reached out saying they're offering a 12% discount if we renew before July 1. The current terms are: $24K/yr for 500K API calls/month. With the discount it'd be $21,120/yr. Can you confirm if we still need this tool for Q3-Q4? Also, do you want me to negotiate further or is the 12% good enough? Need your input by June 28.

Thanks Vikram. We definitely still need Acme — the analytics team relies on it heavily. 12% is decent but I think we can push for 15% given we've been a customer for 3 years. Let me know if you want me to hop on a call with their AM.

Hey Diksha! The v3.0 dashboard mockups are ready for your review. We've redesigned the analytics overview page with a new card-based layout, customizable widgets, and a dark mode toggle. I'd love to get your product perspective before we hand off to engineering. Could you block 30 mins this week? I'm free Thursday 2-4pm or Friday 10am-12pm. Let me know what works!
Those look great, Ananya! Friday 10am works perfectly. I'll review the mockups beforehand. Can you share the Figma link?
